heading: Gain from disposition of farm land
label: 1252 Gain from disposition of farm land

children.label: A
children.text: the applicable percentage of the aggregate of the deductions allowed under section 175 (relating to soil and water conservation expenditures) for expenditures made by the taxpayer with respect to the farm land or

children.label: i
children.text: the amount realized (in the case of a sale, exchange, or involuntary conversion), or the fair market value of the farm land (in the case of any other disposition), over

children.label: ii
children.text: the adjusted basis of such land,

children.heading: Farm land
children.label: 2 Farm land
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “farm land” means any land with respect to which deductions have been allowed under section 175 (relating to soil and water conservation expenditures).

children.heading: Applicable percentage
children.label: 3 Applicable percentage
children.text: For purposes of this section—If the farm land is disposed of—The applicablepercentage is—Within 5 years after the date it was acquired100 percent.Within the sixth year after it was acquired80 percent.Within the seventh year after it was acquired60 percent.Within the eighth year after it was acquired40 percent.Within the ninth year after it was acquired20 percent.10 years or more years after it was acquired0 percent.

children.heading: Special rules
children.label: b Special rules
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, rules similar to the rules of section 1245 shall be applied for purposes of this section.
